case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS DADDINO- MORGAN

docket_entries.description: PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR PETITION MAILED ON MAR 28, 1997

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,644.77 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DADDINO- MORGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-17-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF NOV-18-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CERT. RECEIPT SENT TO PAUL DADDINO RETURNED SIGNED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DADDINO- MORGAN $2,644.77 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,670.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
